title: Eric Trump comments raise questions about future of Air Force One jets
shortDescription: President Trump has said his Qatar-gifted Air Force One will later go to his presidential library. Eric Trump says a different plane will go there.

title: Watch man in bong costume freestyle at New Jersey committee meeting
shortDescription: Dressed in a purple bong costume, a man who identified himself as "Bong Holeo," freestyled during a New Jersey committee meeting on July 7.

title: Democrats slam Trump on housing bill stance
shortDescription: Democrats criticize President Trump after he refuses to sign a major housing bill that will still become law without his signature.

title: White House issues scathing report on iconic museum. We went there.
shortDescription: A White House report accused the National Museum of American History of promoting a "radical, activist ideology." Historians largely disagree.

title: Tennessee bridge renamed after Donald Trump same day as Florida airport
shortDescription: President Donald J. Trump is now the name on a bridge in Tennessee and an airport in Florida. Trump family members celebrated both milestones.

title: 8 men indicted in alleged plot to attack White House UFC event
shortDescription: A grand jury has indicted eight men in an alleged plot to attack the UFC event at White House in June, the Justice Department announced.

title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
shortDescription: President Trump says he won't sign a landmark affordable housing bill into law. It's set to become law at the end of July 10 if no action is taken.

title: Man charged in alleged drone-and-sniper plot at White House UFC event
shortDescription: Eight men have been indicted in an alleged drone-and-sniper plot targeting a UFC event at the White House, federal prosecutors said.

title: Trump fires members of federal election commission
shortDescription: It could take months to fill the vacancies on the commission, which is worrying for states who rely on federal support for the elections.

title: Trump fires members of key election commission ahead of midterms
shortDescription: Created in 2002, the Election Assistance Commission helps local officials prepare for elections.

title: GOP unveils long-shot bills to further dismantle Education Department
shortDescription: Legislation has been introduced to affirm the dismantling of the Education Department. What the move says about the Trump administration's efforts.

title: What's inside Trump Force One? We took a look at Trump's private plane
shortDescription: Palm Beach's airport officially became President Donald Trump International Airport on July 9, with Trump Force One being the first plane to land.

title: Trump's 250-foot DC arch wins preliminary approval from key panel
shortDescription: President Trump's triumphal arch received preliminary approval from a DC panel, allowing the controversial project to move forward to a final vote.

title: Interview with Eric Trump as PBI airport is officially renamed DJT
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's son, Eric, was on board Trump Force One as it landed at PBI, inaugurating the Palm Beach airport's official renaming as DJT.
